top.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
top.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

top.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
top.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.

top.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
top.summary: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

top.title: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
top.summary: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"

top.title: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
top.summary: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.

top.title: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
top.summary: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.
